The '''Ropagu''' were [[Near-Human]]s who lived on [[Ropagi II]].<ref name="Twin Stars of Kira">[[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']]</ref>

They were the creators of the [[Great Library]], containing thousands of [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of Ropagu history.<ref name="Twin Stars of Kira" />

The Ropagu were often hosts for the [[Kalduu]], a [[Species/Legends|species]] also indigenous to Ropagi II. The two species had a long-standing friendship.<ref name="Twin Stars of Kira" />

{{Species-stub}}
